## What's Changed

- Moved Tube TV scheduled items onto the same proven FFmpeg transcode argument builder used by Local playback.
- Removed real-time input throttling and forced MPEG-TS discontinuity flags from item-by-item channel playback.
- Preserved shared timeline seeking, scheduled item cutoffs, hardware transcoding profiles, and channel logo overlays.
- Added regression coverage for Local-style Tube TV item arguments, start offsets, channel logos, and failed-commercial recovery.

## Upgrade

Pull the latest container and restart:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/tatertotterson/tater-tube-server:latest
docker restart tater-tube-server
```

No configuration migration is required. Pair this release with Tater Tube player v1.5.4.
